summary: Iteration 127: CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED - Mira Affirmative Response Handling. All 7 affirmative patterns tested ('yes', 'yes please', 'ok', 'go ahead', 'sure', 'sounds good', 'perfect') - ALL PASS. Mira now responds with follow-up questions/actions instead of going silent.

TEST_01_yes_please_response.details: 'yes please' returns 255 chars response with follow-up question, service_desk_ticket_id=REQ-20260129-0047, is_affirmative_confirmation=true

TEST_04_go_ahead_response.details: 'go ahead' returns 325 chars response, service_desk_ticket_id=REQ-20260129-0049, is_affirmative_confirmation=true

TEST_06_sounds_good_response.details: 'sounds good' returns 266 chars response, service_desk_ticket_id=REQ-20260129-0051, is_affirmative_confirmation=true

TEST_08_service_desk_ticket_created.details: All affirmative responses create service_desk_tickets entries with REQ-* ticket IDs

TEST_09_channel_intakes_created.details: All affirmative responses create channel_intakes entries with channel='mira', verified 26+ Mira-type entries

TEST_10_admin_notifications_created.details: Admin notifications created with type containing 'mira', 26 Mira-type notifications found

TEST_11_guard_check_working.details: GUARD check prevents empty/short responses - all responses >= 20 chars, end_state='RESPONDED'

TEST_12_end_state_valid.details: All responses have valid end_state='RESPONDED' (not silent)

verified_fixes.mira_silent_after_yes_please: FIXED - Mira now responds with follow-up question asking for location/date preferences
verified_fixes.affirmative_detection: FIXED - detect_concierge_action_needed() correctly identifies 'yes', 'yes please', 'ok', 'go ahead', 'sure', 'sounds good', 'perfect' as affirmative confirmations
verified_fixes.service_desk_ticket_creation: FIXED - All affirmative responses create service_desk_tickets entries
verified_fixes.channel_intakes_creation: FIXED - All affirmative responses create channel_intakes entries with channel='mira'
verified_fixes.admin_notifications_creation: FIXED - Admin notifications created for Mira requests
verified_fixes.guard_check: VERIFIED - GUARD at lines 2825-2860 prevents empty/short responses, forces recovery response if needed
verified_fixes.error_handler: VERIFIED - Error handler at lines 2939-2959 returns actionable response with retry options

critical_code_review_comments: detect_concierge_action_needed() function (lines 886-960) correctly detects affirmative patterns and sets is_affirmative_confirmation=true
create_service_desk_ticket() function (lines 962-1163) creates entries in all 3 collections: service_desk_tickets, channel_intakes, admin_notifications
GUARD check (lines 2825-2860) prevents silent responses by forcing recovery response if LLM returns empty/short response
Error handler (lines 2939-2959) returns actionable response with retry options instead of generic error
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created with unique session IDs for each affirmative pattern test
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Mira no longer goes silent after 'yes please' or other affirmative responses. The detect_concierge_action_needed() function now correctly identifies affirmative patterns and triggers the unified flow (service_desk_tickets + channel_intakes + admin_notifications). The GUARD check prevents empty/short responses.
api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/mira/chat - Tested with 7 affirmative patterns, all return non-empty responses with follow-up
GET /api/channels/intakes?channel=mira - Verified Mira channel intakes are created
GET /api/admin/notifications - Verified admin notifications are created
GET /api/mira/session/{session_id} - Verified Mira tickets are created

response_samples.yes_please:
Hi, I'm Mira. I can help explain things, guide you to the right place, or connect you with our Concierge.

Perfect! Let me help arrange that for you.
Quick question so I can get this right: which area or part of the city would you prefer for the restaurant?
